policies.name: Block production deploys from Copilot agents
policies.description: No GitHub Copilot agent can deploy directly to production

policies.name: Block secrets access
policies.description: Copilot agents must never access secret management systems

policies.name: Require approval for infra changes
policies.description: Infrastructure changes from Copilot agents require human approval

policies.name: Require approval for database migrations
policies.description: Database migrations from any Copilot agent require human approval
